required_boundaries: no raw telemetry or secrets in roadmap artifacts

modules.rollback_procedure: Disable new firstboot wiring, remove packaged helper references, and fall back to the previous preseed/firstboot scripts without changing live host or VM state.
Remove or disable only the new passive policy evidence helper or documentation path; do not loosen host firewall, remoting, SSH, or VM isolation controls.

modules.owner_role: NN IDS posture and release-gate maintainer
modules.rollback_procedure: Keep prior models and snapshots intact, remove only the newly added passive evidence helper or gate wiring, and require manual review before any restore or retraining action.
Disable only the new release-gate or receipt helper; keep snapshots and restore scripts available but require explicit operator review before use.

validation_focus: static shell and Python syntax checks
modules.rollback_procedure: Revert only the documentation or test increment; no deployed host, VM, firewall, IDS, service, model, dataset, credential, or account state is changed by this roadmap.

next_increment_candidates.title: README duplicate-module drift static check
next_increment_candidates.rationale: README currently contains repeated feature and project-structure entries; a passive drift check can prevent future documentation confusion without deleting current content.

next_increment_candidates.title: Host/VM policy configuration schema
next_increment_candidates.rationale: A schema can validate thresholds, artifact paths, and enablement choices before firstboot or ISO promotion.

next_increment_candidates.title: Unified aggregate posture gate
next_increment_candidates.rationale: A single privacy-safe gate can compose Kali guest readiness, host/VM isolation, NN IDS health, drift, model-card, release receipts, and rollback readiness.

rollback: Delete docs/repository_module_roadmap.json, docs/repository_module_roadmap.md, docs/changelog_repository_module_roadmap.md, and tests/test_repository_module_roadmap_static.sh. No live firewall, service, host, VM, IDS, approval, restore, model, dataset, account, credential, or network state requires rollback.
